title: Items Core
summary: In-place L1 module: item/container/currency catalog codegen, ownership model (add/remove/move/count/can_afford/purse/unique instances), and a read-only op-layer CLI (list/validate/schema).
dependencies: templates/template/content/items.json + content/item_fields.schema.json (or a game-local items catalog)
template or game C runtime using the generated items_catalog.gen.{h,c} + the generated items save fragment (features/game-state)
the consuming game's own src/features/items/reason_tags.h (closed reason-verb list, resolved via the game's include-path, §2.3 of build_spec_t0337_2026-07-07.md)

registers.note: Describes the EXISTING wiring in templates/template/CMakeLists.txt (target_sources/ctest) -- items-core is an in-place module (precedent features/game-state), not an install-script target. This section documents the consuming game's provisioning, it does not perform it.
